title: citrus medica subf. pyriformis
intro: Citrus medica subf. pyriformis, also known as the Buddha's Hand, is a rare and unique variety of citron, a type of citrus fruit. It is highly valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Buddha's Hand include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations, such as tea, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
